title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss how AI is affecting these different sectors of society, then decide which one will undergo the most radical change.

script.text: Please talk together about how artificial intelligence is being used in these different areas.
Now decide which of these sectors will be most unrecognizable in ten years due to AI.
